data.title: Global gold trade group plans platform linking physical gold to tokenized gold products, Council to develop system.
data.description: The World Gold Council has announced its plan to create a platform that will link physical gold to the processes involved in issuing and overseeing tokenized gold products.
Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reports the shutdown of refinery units at Al Ahmadi after a drone strike.
Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reports that an attack on the Al Ahmadi refinery led to fires in several units.
Kuwait Petroleum Corporation reports that crews are actively battling a fire at its Al Ahmadi port refinery.

data.title: Gemini, Winklevoss Twins Sued By Investors For 'False' IPO Claims, Operational Shifts — Crypto Exchange's Q4 Loss Deepens
data.description: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI) and the Winklevoss brothers by shareholders, claiming that the company deceived investors regarding its Initial Public Offering. The lawsuit, initiated by a San Diego-based law firm Robbins LLP, alleged that Gemini omitted crucial details in its IPO documents. It was accused of exaggerating the feasibility of its primary business model as a cryptocurrency platform and its global expansion plans. The legal action further asserted that Gemini's financial and business outlook following the IPO was misrepresented. Shareholders argued that statements made by co-founders Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss were significantly inaccurate. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
Financial Times reports that an oil tanker company paid Iran $2 million for secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

Rio Tinto sees its price target reduced by JPMorgan Chase & Co. to 7,030p, down from 7,220p.
The Sage Group has its target price cut to 1,100p from 1,300p by JPMorgan Chase & Co..

data.title: iQIYI's "Pursuit of Jade" Captures Global Audience with Chart-Topping Performance
data.description: On March 6, 2026, iQIYI, the top online entertainment platform in China, debuted the historical romance series "Pursuit of Jade." The show gained rapid popularity worldwide, with viewership soaring within its first six days of release. In that short period, "Pursuit of Jade" exceeded an impressive number of views on iQIYI.
The Indian rupee weakens further, slipping beyond the 93 mark against the U.S. dollar and down 0.4% intraday.

data.title: Gemini's stock spikes 6% post-market on robust Q4 earnings of $60.3M, marking highest quarterly revenue since 3 years.
data.description: Gemini disclosed that its revenue for the fourth quarter amounted to $60.3 million, marking its highest quarterly revenue in a span of three years, as stated by co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss.

data.title: Iran conflict restricts flight paths: Only a few corridors remain between Europe and Asia, passing through Azerbaijan, Georgia, and Turkey.
data.description: Air travel between the continents has become more challenging due to global conflicts, with only a limited number of flight paths available. Azerbaijan, Georgia, and Turkey serve as key countries through which this travel corridor passes. These routes are vital for maintaining connectivity between the continents amidst the disruptions in aviation logistics.

data.title: Energy shortages in Asia are evident as major oil exporters limit exports. Import-dependent nations struggle for fuel.
data.description: With restrictions on refined oil exports by China and other key suppliers in the region, import-dependent nations are racing to secure fuel supplies. This has led to a surge in demand for fuel imports as countries strive to meet their energy needs. The tight market conditions have caused prices to rise sharply, with the cost of fuel skyrocketing by approximately 20% in the past month. As a result, countries are scrambling to negotiate deals and secure sufficient fuel stocks to avoid shortages and price spikes in their domestic markets.

data.title: No Rate Cuts In 2026? Prediction Market Is Betting This On Fed Moves
data.description: The Federal Reserve chose to maintain the current interest rates for the third consecutive time, which was in accordance with market forecasts. The most recent rate reduction by the Fed was disclosed back in December 2025. In the statement from the Federal Open Market Committee, it was highlighted that although economic growth has been robust, there is still a persisting issue with high levels of inflation. President Donald Trump had urged Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell to promptly announce rate cuts in a recent post on Truth Social. Trump's message emphasized the need for Powell to take immediate action on lowering interest rates. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
The official spokesperson of the Saudi Ministry of Defense reports interception of two drones over the Eastern Region.
According to Iranian media, multiple attacks have struck areas including Tehran, Arak, and Karaj.
